description_long: This is a set of three wooden cabinets, each with a rich brown finish and a classic, sturdy design. The leftmost cabinet features an open shelf with a visible divider, suitable for storing books or decorative items. The central cabinet has two drawers, each equipped with a metallic handle, providing enclosed storage space. The rightmost unit displays both drawers pulled out, revealing a lighter wood interior and ample storage capacity. The backs of the cabinets are plain, with a natural wood grain visible, and the tops are flat, suitable for placing objects. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, making these cabinets ideal for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A trio of brown wooden cabinets, including an open-shelf unit and two-drawer storage pieces with metallic handles and flat tops for additional use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth and profile of the three cabinets, with the open shelf and drawers aligned in a row.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open shelf on the left, two closed drawers in the center, and two open drawers on the right, highlighting storage options.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the side profiles and the lighter wood interiors of the open drawers.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the plain wooden backs of the cabinets and the open drawers on the leftmost unit.
